# PHImageContentMode.aspectFill

**Case**

Scales the image so that it completely fills the target size.

## Declaration

```swift
case aspectFill
```

## Discussion

Use this option when you want the image to completely fill an area, such as when presenting it in a view with the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIView/ContentMode-swift.enum/scaleAspectFill] content mode.

## Constants

- **default**: Fits the image to the requested size using the default option, [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageContentMode/aspectFit].
- **PHImageContentMode.aspectFit**: Scales the image so that its larger dimension fits the target size.
